task: B1: fix the /inventory Parts & Stock page that called a non-existent /api/v1/inventory/parts endpoint (404). Frontend-only repoint to the real /api/v1/maintenance/parts route (single source of truth = maintenance.parts_inventory; no new backend, no DB, no duplication). GET maps the endpoint's row shape onto the page columns via a pure unit-tested mapper (mapMaintenancePartsToInventoryRows: qty_on_hand->on_hand_qty, part_number->sku, derive status); create drawer POSTs to /api/v1/maintenance/parts with company in the query string and the createSchema body mapping. Dropped two columns with no backing data (category, reorder_point, assigned_to) — no fake data. Tracker B1 row updated in this PR.
